name: Single-Language Event
description: Simple single-language presentation or talk. Minimal cues.

cues.label: Pre-Roll
cues.notes: Hold while setting up. Display title slate.

cues.label: Introduction
cues.notes: Host introduces the speaker or event.

cues.label: Main Presentation
cues.notes: Primary speaker or content. Apply lower third with name.

cues.label: Post-Roll
cues.notes: End slate. Stop stream after all participants have left.
